manifest.json.name: GTM Pipeline Q2 Review Service Blueprint

project.name: GTM Pipeline Q2 Review
project.summary: PM brief: Revenue operations needs a governed GTM agent system that can answer pipeline health, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach-support questions across four bounded ANIP services while preserving actor-aware visibility, explicit service handoffs, approval stops, and auditable behavior.

backend_bindings.data_access_target_label: Postgres Raw Tables, Dbt Modeled Pipeline Views, Cube Semantic Queries, Rest Prioritization Backend, Mcp Outreach Backend

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: A bounded summary of pipeline health for a quarter and scope.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Pipeline Review as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: An explainable ranking of open accounts that need attention.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Account Risk as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: A prepared set of recommended tasks that still requires approval before downstream execution.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Follow-up Plan as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: A prepared set of reassignment recommendations that still requires approval before downstream execution.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Reassignment Plan as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: Bounded firmographic and account context for approved accounts.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Account Enrichment as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: An account similar to an approved reference account with explainable similarity signals.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Lookalike Account as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: A bounded score band and reason-code summary for a lead or account.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Lead Score as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: An explainable ordering of accounts for GTM action.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Account Priority as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: A prepared routing recommendation that requires approval before mutation.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Routing Plan as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: Draft-only outreach content generated from approved context.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Outreach Draft as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: Suggested follow-up messaging content that remains review-only.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Follow-up Content as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

domain_concept_bindings.concept_detail: Bounded response variants using approved claims and account context.
domain_concept_bindings.technical_representation: Represent Objection Response as an explicit domain concept in the generated contract and bind it to the owning service where the service design declares ownership.

service_topology_bindings.source_role: answers bounded pipeline review questions and prepares follow-up and reassignment previews
answers bounded account enrichment and lookalike questions over approved account scope
scores and prioritizes bounded GTM work with explainable routing recommendations
provides bounded draft-only outreach support through an MCP-fronted backend

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Pipeline Summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded pipeline health summary for a quarter and optional scope.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Pipeline Forecast Summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded forecast summary for open pipeline with likely, best-case, and risk-adjusted views.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Stage Bottleneck Summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded stage bottleneck summary for open pipeline by an allowed slice.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Sales Team Performance Summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded sales team performance summary for a quarter and optional scope.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Product Pipeline Summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return a bounded product pipeline summary for a quarter and optional scope.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Prepare Reassignment Plan
capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare a reassignment preview for overloaded pipeline coverage without executing downstream mutations.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Stalled Opportunity Review
capability_formalizations.summary: Return stalled open opportunities with bounded evidence and explainable stall reasoning.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Account Risk Summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Rank at-risk accounts with explicit evidence for why they need attention.

inputs.summary: Maximum number of accounts to include.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Prepare Followup Tasks
capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare follow-up tasks for high-risk accounts without executing downstream mutations.

inputs.summary: Maximum number of follow-up task previews to include.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Account Enrichment Summary
capability_formalizations.summary: Return bounded firmographic and account context for selected accounts.

inputs.summary: Maximum number of accounts to summarize.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Lookalike Accounts
capability_formalizations.summary: Return explainable lookalike accounts for an approved reference account or cohort.

inputs.summary: Reference account name for lookalike matching.
Maximum number of lookalike accounts to return.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Score Leads
capability_formalizations.summary: Score bounded leads or accounts with explainable reasons.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Prioritize Accounts
capability_formalizations.summary: Prioritize bounded accounts for GTM action with explainable ranking.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Route Leads
capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare bounded routing recommendations without executing downstream assignment mutations.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Draft Outreach Message
capability_formalizations.summary: Draft bounded outreach content for approved account or contact context.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Suggest Followup Content
capability_formalizations.summary: Suggest bounded follow-up content for an approved outreach or account context.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.Objection Response Variants
capability_formalizations.summary: Generate bounded objection-response variants for a known account or outreach scenario.

capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.At Risk Followup Preparation
capability_formalizations.summary: Compose gtm.account_risk_summary -> gtm.prepare_followup_tasks for Hero path: at-risk Q2 deals to approval stop.

inputs.summary: Maximum number of accounts to include.

actor_expectations.summary_formalization: Asks pipeline health, account risk, and follow-up preparation questions.
actor_expectations.visibility_formalization: Can see bounded pipeline summaries and evidence for authorized pipeline scope.
actor_expectations.action_formalization: Can request preparation of follow-up or reassignment previews.
actor_expectations.approval_formalization: Must obtain approval before any downstream mutation is executed.

actor_expectations.summary_formalization: Reviews overloaded ownership, reassignment suggestions, and follow-up plans.
actor_expectations.visibility_formalization: Can review bounded team and opportunity evidence relevant to their pipeline scope.
actor_expectations.action_formalization: Can review and approve or reject prepared operational plans.
actor_expectations.approval_formalization: Acts as approval authority for high-impact follow-up and reassignment execution.

permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Return scoped summaries with evidence and no raw row-level export.
permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: gtm_operator bounded access to Pipeline Review should return bounded_result. Return scoped summaries with evidence and no raw row-level export. Quarter and ranking basis must be explicit or clarified.

permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Prepare a preview and stop before any downstream mutation.
permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: gtm_operator approval_required access to Operational Preparation should return approval_stop. Prepare a preview and stop before any downstream mutation. Covers follow-up tasks and reassignment planning.

permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Review prepared plans and approve or reject execution outside the draft step.
permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: sales_manager bounded access to Operational Preparation should return direct_result. Review prepared plans and approve or reject execution outside the draft step. Approval authority should be auditable.

scenario_formalizations.scenario_title: Hero path: at-risk Q2 deals to approval stop

orchestration_steps.outcome_notes: Rank at-risk accounts with explicit evidence for why they need attention.
Prepare follow-up tasks for high-risk accounts without executing downstream mutations.

scenario_formalizations.scenario_title: Clarification path: missing quarter or ranking basis
Clear read: stalled opportunities over 30 days

orchestration_steps.outcome_notes: Return stalled open opportunities with bounded evidence and explainable stall reasoning.

scenario_formalizations.scenario_title: Phase 1 denial: raw row-level export request

composition_rules.rule: Compose pipeline review, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach only through explicit service boundaries.
composition_rules.formalization_strategy: Preserve this product-wide composition rule by keeping each participating service boundary, intermediate result, and stop condition explicit in scenario orchestration: Compose pipeline review, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach only through explicit service boundaries.

composition_rules.rule: Carry actor, task, and scope lineage across service handoffs.
composition_rules.formalization_strategy: Preserve this product-wide composition rule by keeping each participating service boundary, intermediate result, and stop condition explicit in scenario orchestration: Carry actor, task, and scope lineage across service handoffs.

composition_rules.rule: Do not turn a preview into an execution step without a recorded approval decision.
composition_rules.formalization_strategy: Preserve this product-wide composition rule by keeping each participating service boundary, intermediate result, and stop condition explicit in scenario orchestration: Do not turn a preview into an execution step without a recorded approval decision.

supported_question_family_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify "Pipeline health and forecast summaries" through generated service scenarios, runtime evidence, and observed service metadata for the selected service boundary.
supported_question_family_bindings.evidence_signal: Passing regression evidence and service metadata alignment for "Pipeline health and forecast summaries".

supported_question_family_bindings.question_family: Stage bottleneck and sales team performance summaries
supported_question_family_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify "Stage bottleneck and sales team performance summaries" through generated service scenarios, runtime evidence, and observed service metadata for the selected service boundary.
supported_question_family_bindings.evidence_signal: Passing regression evidence and service metadata alignment for "Stage bottleneck and sales team performance summaries".

supported_question_family_bindings.question_family: At-risk account and stalled opportunity review
supported_question_family_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify "At-risk account and stalled opportunity review" through generated service scenarios, runtime evidence, and observed service metadata for the selected service boundary.
supported_question_family_bindings.evidence_signal: Passing regression evidence and service metadata alignment for "At-risk account and stalled opportunity review".

supported_question_family_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify "Account enrichment and lookalike analysis" through generated service scenarios, runtime evidence, and observed service metadata for the selected service boundary.
supported_question_family_bindings.evidence_signal: Passing regression evidence and service metadata alignment for "Account enrichment and lookalike analysis".

supported_question_family_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify "Lead and account prioritization" through generated service scenarios, runtime evidence, and observed service metadata for the selected service boundary.
supported_question_family_bindings.evidence_signal: Passing regression evidence and service metadata alignment for "Lead and account prioritization".

supported_question_family_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify "Outreach drafting and objection-response support" through generated service scenarios, runtime evidence, and observed service metadata for the selected service boundary.
supported_question_family_bindings.evidence_signal: Passing regression evidence and service metadata alignment for "Outreach drafting and objection-response support".

supported_question_family_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify "Approval-gated follow-up and reassignment preparation" through generated service scenarios, runtime evidence, and observed service metadata for the selected service boundary.
supported_question_family_bindings.evidence_signal: Passing regression evidence and service metadata alignment for "Approval-gated follow-up and reassignment preparation".

business_goal_bindings.business_goal: Answer bounded pipeline health and forecast questions with evidence.
business_goal_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify that the selected services preserve the business goal: Answer bounded pipeline health and forecast questions with evidence.
business_goal_bindings.evidence_signal: Scenario and runtime evidence demonstrate: Answer bounded pipeline health and forecast questions with evidence.

business_goal_bindings.business_goal: Enrich selected accounts and identify lookalikes with bounded context.
business_goal_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify that the selected services preserve the business goal: Enrich selected accounts and identify lookalikes with bounded context.
business_goal_bindings.evidence_signal: Scenario and runtime evidence demonstrate: Enrich selected accounts and identify lookalikes with bounded context.

business_goal_bindings.business_goal: Prioritize accounts and leads through explainable scoring and routing recommendations.
business_goal_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify that the selected services preserve the business goal: Prioritize accounts and leads through explainable scoring and routing recommendations.
business_goal_bindings.evidence_signal: Scenario and runtime evidence demonstrate: Prioritize accounts and leads through explainable scoring and routing recommendations.

business_goal_bindings.business_goal: Draft outreach support while keeping content generation bounded and reviewable.
business_goal_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify that the selected services preserve the business goal: Draft outreach support while keeping content generation bounded and reviewable.
business_goal_bindings.evidence_signal: Scenario and runtime evidence demonstrate: Draft outreach support while keeping content generation bounded and reviewable.

business_goal_bindings.business_goal: Identify at-risk accounts and stalled opportunities with explainable reasons.
business_goal_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify that the selected services preserve the business goal: Identify at-risk accounts and stalled opportunities with explainable reasons.
business_goal_bindings.evidence_signal: Scenario and runtime evidence demonstrate: Identify at-risk accounts and stalled opportunities with explainable reasons.

business_goal_bindings.business_goal: Prepare follow-up and reassignment plans while stopping before mutation until approval is granted.
business_goal_bindings.verification_strategy: Verify that the selected services preserve the business goal: Prepare follow-up and reassignment plans while stopping before mutation until approval is granted.
business_goal_bindings.evidence_signal: Scenario and runtime evidence demonstrate: Prepare follow-up and reassignment plans while stopping before mutation until approval is granted.

non_goal_guards.non_goal: Do not expose broad raw row-level CRM exports.
non_goal_guards.guard_strategy: Preserve this non-goal as an explicit denial, restriction, clarification, or safe-stop rule where requests would otherwise cross the declared boundary.
non_goal_guards.evidence_signal: The first release is a bounded summary and preparation workflow, not a data extraction tool.

non_goal_guards.non_goal: Do not execute follow-up tasks or reassignment changes without explicit approval.
non_goal_guards.guard_strategy: Preserve this non-goal as an explicit denial, restriction, clarification, or safe-stop rule where requests would otherwise cross the declared boundary.
non_goal_guards.evidence_signal: Write-adjacent GTM actions must remain preview-and-approve in the governed contract.

non_goal_guards.non_goal: Do not guess missing quarter, pipeline scope, or ranking basis.
non_goal_guards.guard_strategy: Preserve this non-goal as an explicit denial, restriction, clarification, or safe-stop rule where requests would otherwise cross the declared boundary.
non_goal_guards.evidence_signal: Ambiguous operational requests should clarify instead of silently choosing defaults.

success_criteria_checks.success_criterion: Bounded pipeline and account-risk questions return useful answers with evidence.
success_criteria_checks.evidence_expectation: Regression questions for pipeline summary, forecast, bottlenecks, performance, products, and risk pass.
success_criteria_checks.review_method: Run the Studio verification harness and inspect answer evidence.
success_criteria_checks.verification_strategy: Run the Studio verification harness and inspect answer evidence.

success_criteria_checks.success_criterion: Ambiguous requests ask targeted clarifying questions instead of guessing.
success_criteria_checks.evidence_expectation: Missing quarter and missing ranking-basis scenarios return clarification outcomes.

success_criteria_checks.success_criterion: Unsafe exports are denied and write-adjacent work stops for approval.
success_criteria_checks.evidence_expectation: Raw export requests deny; follow-up and reassignment flows produce approval-stop previews.
success_criteria_checks.review_method: Run denial and approval-gated regression scenarios.
success_criteria_checks.verification_strategy: Run denial and approval-gated regression scenarios.

scenario_pack.title: Hero path: at-risk Q2 deals to approval stop
Clarification path: missing quarter or ranking basis
Clear read: stalled opportunities over 30 days
Phase 1 denial: raw row-level export request

service_design.title: GTM revenue operations service estate design

services.name: GTM Pipeline Service
services.role: answers bounded pipeline review questions and prepares follow-up and reassignment previews

services.name: GTM Enrichment Service
services.role: answers bounded account enrichment and lookalike questions over approved account scope

services.name: GTM Prioritization Service
services.role: scores and prioritizes bounded GTM work with explainable routing recommendations

services.name: GTM Outreach Service
services.role: provides bounded draft-only outreach support through an MCP-fronted backend

coordination.description: Pipeline risk outputs may pass bounded account identifiers into enrichment while preserving actor and task lineage.
Approved enrichment summaries may inform prioritization without exposing raw enrichment features.
Approved prioritized accounts may inform draft-only outreach generation without sending messages.

product_alignment.governed_behavior_formalization: Return bounded service-specific outputs, ask for missing quarter, account scope, ranking basis, or audience context, deny broad raw exports, preserve service handoff boundaries, and preserve approval stops for write-adjacent work.
product_alignment.approval_posture_formalization: Direct reads are allowed when scoped; high-risk follow-up task and reassignment preparation must produce a preview and stop for approval before downstream execution.

sections.label: Service Identity & Topology
sections.description: How the system is decomposed into services and how those services are named and bounded.

linked_product_design_items.label: GTM Operator
linked_product_design_items.detail: Asks pipeline health, account risk, and follow-up preparation questions.

linked_product_design_items.label: GTM Operator visibility
linked_product_design_items.detail: Can see bounded pipeline summaries and evidence for authorized pipeline scope.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Manager
linked_product_design_items.detail: Reviews overloaded ownership, reassignment suggestions, and follow-up plans.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Manager visibility
linked_product_design_items.detail: Can review bounded team and opportunity evidence relevant to their pipeline scope.

linked_product_design_items.label: What is the name of your system?
linked_product_design_items.detail: gtm-pipeline-q2-review

linked_product_design_items.label: What domain does this system operate in?
linked_product_design_items.detail: revenue_operations

linked_product_design_items.label: How will this system be deployed?
linked_product_design_items.detail: multi_service_estate

linked_product_design_items.label: How should this system be delivered?
linked_product_design_items.detail: multi_service_estate

linked_product_design_items.label: GTM Pipeline Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Owns capabilities: Gtm.Pipeline Summary, Gtm.Pipeline Forecast Summary, Gtm.Stage Bottleneck Summary, Gtm.Sales Team Performance Summary, Gtm.Product Pipeline Summary, Gtm.Prepare Reassignment Plan, Gtm.Stalled Opportunity Review, Gtm.Account Risk Summary, Gtm.Prepare Followup Tasks

linked_product_design_items.label: GTM Enrichment Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Owns capabilities: Gtm.Account Enrichment Summary, Gtm.Lookalike Accounts

linked_product_design_items.label: GTM Prioritization Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Owns capabilities: Gtm.Score Leads, Gtm.Prioritize Accounts, Gtm.Route Leads

linked_product_design_items.label: GTM Outreach Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Owns capabilities: Gtm.Draft Outreach Message, Gtm.Suggest Followup Content, Gtm.Objection Response Variants

linked_product_design_items.label: Gtm Pipeline Service -> Gtm Enrichment Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Pipeline risk outputs may pass bounded account identifiers into enrichment while preserving actor and task lineage.

linked_product_design_items.label: Gtm Enrichment Service -> Gtm Prioritization Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Approved enrichment summaries may inform prioritization without exposing raw enrichment features.

linked_product_design_items.label: Gtm Prioritization Service -> Gtm Outreach Service
linked_product_design_items.detail: Approved prioritized accounts may inform draft-only outreach generation without sending messages.

sections.label: Authority & Approval
sections.description: How restrictions, denials, approvals, and clarification posture become formal service behavior.

linked_product_design_items.label: Approval Posture Summary
linked_product_design_items.detail: Direct reads are allowed when scoped; high-risk follow-up task and reassignment preparation must produce a preview and stop for approval before downstream execution.

linked_product_design_items.label: GTM Operator approval expectations
linked_product_design_items.detail: Must obtain approval before any downstream mutation is executed.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Manager approval expectations
linked_product_design_items.detail: Acts as approval authority for high-impact follow-up and reassignment execution.

linked_product_design_items.label: Gtm Operator · Pipeline Review
linked_product_design_items.detail: Bounded · Bounded Result · Return scoped summaries with evidence and no raw row-level export.

linked_product_design_items.label: Gtm Operator · Operational Preparation
linked_product_design_items.detail: Approval Required · Approval Stop · Prepare a preview and stop before any downstream mutation.

linked_product_design_items.label: Sales Manager · Operational Preparation
linked_product_design_items.detail: Bounded · Direct Result · Review prepared plans and approve or reject execution outside the draft step.

linked_product_design_items.label: What caller-verification posture should the business require?
linked_product_design_items.detail: signed

linked_product_design_items.label: Should the system re-check trust and authority at important execution steps?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should costs be visible to callers before actions execute?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should agents be able to discover what they are allowed to do before acting?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Can restricted actions be unlocked by granting additional authority?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should the system distinguish between restricted and denied actions?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Will this system use delegation tokens to carry scoped authority?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should authority be scoped to limit what agents can do?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should delegated authority be bound to a specific purpose?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should high-risk actions require explicit approval before execution?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Does this system need explicit recovery guidance for failures?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: What should happen when an action is blocked or fails?
linked_product_design_items.detail: human_review_for_unresolved_or_approval_gated_work

sections.label: Backend Bindings
sections.description: How the ANIP surface maps to real backend systems, adapters, operations, and implementation targets.

sections.label: Audit & Lineage
sections.description: What evidence, lineage, and traceability the generated implementation must preserve.

linked_product_design_items.label: Bounded pipeline and account-risk questions return useful answers with evidence.
linked_product_design_items.detail: Regression questions for pipeline summary, forecast, bottlenecks, performance, products, and risk pass.

linked_product_design_items.label: Ambiguous requests ask targeted clarifying questions instead of guessing.
linked_product_design_items.detail: Missing quarter and missing ranking-basis scenarios return clarification outcomes.

linked_product_design_items.label: Unsafe exports are denied and write-adjacent work stops for approval.
linked_product_design_items.detail: Raw export requests deny; follow-up and reassignment flows produce approval-stop previews.

linked_product_design_items.label: Should this system keep a durable record of important actions?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should those records be searchable later?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should each execution be traceable as its own identifiable event?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should related executions be grouped into one traceable unit of work?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should the system preserve parent-child execution chains for later reconstruction?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should external systems be able to attach their own reference IDs?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Will work need to carry authority across service boundaries?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should teams be able to reconstruct work across service boundaries later?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

linked_product_design_items.label: Should execution chains stay intact as work moves across services?
linked_product_design_items.detail: Yes

sections.label: Generation & Extension Points
sections.description: Which technical choices directly affect generated scaffolds and where manual extension points remain.

extension_points.label: Data Access Capability Surface
extension_points.rationale: Capability contract shape, service contract, and scenario-pack artifacts are generated directly from the compiled contract.

extension_points.label: Data Access Backend Adapter
extension_points.rationale: Studio generates the adapter scaffold and binding posture, but backend-specific query semantics and credential wiring still need handwritten completion.

extension_points.label: Application Integration Capability Surface
extension_points.rationale: Capability structure, scenario-pack artifacts, and contract-level governed outcomes are generated directly from the compiled contract.

extension_points.label: Application Integration Backend Adapter
extension_points.rationale: Studio generates adapter scaffolding and backend binding intent, but backend-specific request/response mapping and runtime secrets remain implementation work.

extension_points.label: Application Integration Policy Runtime
extension_points.rationale: Studio generates a policy stub from governance rules, but runtime enforcement glue and handwritten decision logic may still be required.

extension_points.label: Cross-Service Composition Runtime
extension_points.rationale: Multi-service delivery still needs explicit runtime composition and deployment wiring beyond the generated service scaffolds.

checks.label: Schema Valid
checks.detail: Service Definition has a compiled contract digest.

checks.label: Generated
checks.detail: Runtime target outputs were generated from the saved revision.

checks.label: Integration Adapter Bindings
checks.detail: 0 integration-fronting mapping(s) have connection and raw operation bindings.

checks.label: Backend Selection Template
checks.detail: 0 capability mapping(s) require deployment-time backend selection.

checks.label: Runtime Surface Valid
checks.detail: Accepted integration-fronting mappings are present in the formalized capability and runtime surfaces.

checks.label: Extension Hooks Bound
checks.detail: Application integration backend adapter extension surface is declared.

checks.label: Contract Evidence Aligned
checks.detail: Generated runtime target identity aligns with the saved Service Definition identity.
